global.name: GlassSurface
global.description: Premium glassmorphism for overlays, scoreboards, and lobby configs.
global.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl

global.name: PlayingCard
global.description: Minimalist, sleek card design built with CSS. Pure white base, slight inner shadow.
global.classes: bg-[#FAFAFA] rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-white/20 aspect-[2.5/3.5] flex flex-col justify-between p-2 sm:p-3 text-xl sm:text-3xl font-bold transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-4 hover:rotate-1

global.name: PrimaryCTA
global.description: Gold/Champagne button for major actions like 'Start Game' or 'Place Bid'.
global.classes: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#F3E5AB] to-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.6)] transition-all

shadcn_overrides.Button: Make primary buttons Gold. Use pill-shape (rounded-full) for game actions to feel more like casino chips.
shadcn_overrides.Dialog: Use GlassSurface classes. Remove default white background. Use text-white.
shadcn_overrides.Card: Use GlassSurface. Do not use default white borders.

layout_strategies.App Shell: Generous spacing. Hide native scrollbars. Screen-filling radial green gradient.
layout_strategies.Bidding Modal: Centered overlay over the game table. Neumorphic buttons for numeric bids to feel tactile.
layout_strategies.Game Table: Radial/Spatial layout. Player hand fixed to bottom center. Opponents positioned around the top and sides. Active trick cards overlap slightly in the direct center.
layout_strategies.Lobby: Control Room grid structure. Split into 'Players Connected' list, and 'Game Configuration' panel.
layout_strategies.Scoreboard: Dense table view but with generous row padding (`py-4`) and monospace fonts for numbers so they align perfectly.

motion_and_interactions.Card Hover: Lift up `-translate-y-4` and slight rotation to feel physical.
motion_and_interactions.Card Play: Smoothly animate (`framer-motion` layoutId) from the player's hand to the center table.
motion_and_interactions.Trick Win: Winning cards scale down and slide toward the winning player's avatar.
motion_and_interactions.Modals: Fade in with a slight scale up (`scale-95` to `scale-100`), backed by an extra `backdrop-blur-md` on the root.

image_urls.description: Green textile. Can be used as an absolute positioned overlay with `opacity-10` and `mix-blend-overlay` or `mix-blend-multiply` over the radial gradient to create physical felt realism.
Dark atmospheric casino chips/cards. Perfect for a landing page hero visual. Must use a heavy black gradient overlay (e.g. `bg-black/60`) so text is readable.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react (installed by default). For playing card suits, rely on standard unicode symbols (♠, ♥, ♦, ♣) scaled up and styled with absolute precision.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements (cards, buttons, modal triggers, player avatars) must have descriptive data-testid (e.g., 'play-card-ace-spades', 'bid-button-3').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure gold text on dark green passes APCA contrast. Use pure white for critical game text.
accessibility_and_testing.prefers_reduced_motion: Ensure framer-motion respects `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` for slide and scale effects.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use `Inter` for headings. Ensure `Outfit` and `DM Sans` are loaded.

Apply `min-h-screen bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,_#1A4B33_0%,_#0A1C13_100%)]` on the main game area root. DO NOT USE PLAIN FLAT COLORS for the background. It must feel like a premium lit table.

For the cards, build a custom component with pure HTML/Tailwind. Do not rely on external images for playing cards. Create an `aspect-[2.5/3.5]` white div with rounded corners (`rounded-xl`), an inner border (`border-white/20`), and text matching the suit color. Ensure it visually separates from the dark green table.
Opponent Avatars should be minimalist rings displaying their bid vs won tricks (e.g., 'Won 2 / Bid 3') positioned around the central table.
The bidding modal should freeze the background (use `backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/50`) so focus is entirely on selecting the exact number.
Always apply generous spacing (`p-6` or `p-8`) inside any GlassSurface components.
Build out the actual WebSockets or mock logic cleanly, but ensure the UI reacts instantaneously. If mocked, highlight this clearly in the logs or a tiny overlay text.
